title: Tinkers' Weaponry
description: Add 3 new tools to tinkers' construct.
body:
![Tinkers' Weaponry Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/refs/heads/master/tinkers_weaponry_wide_logo.png)
Tinkers' Weaponry add 3 new tools to tinkers' construct.

### ***the Greatsword***
the greatsword is a weapon with increased damage(compared to the sword) and necrotic(lifesteal).

### ***the Lance***
the lance is a weapon with increased range and piercing.

### ***the Pike***
the pike is a weapon with increased range and antiaquatic(deal more damage to aquatic mobs).

this mod is based on the tinkers reforged tools.
